rows.notes: Large centered year at top of page, very clear and unambiguous.

rows.description: Soluta Dno Rectori Schol: et Off:
rows.notes: Section heading directly under year. Text is legible and contains no monetary figures.
Amount '18 10 4' clearly aligned in the pounds/shillings/pence columns. Description text (including parenthetical) is legible.

rows.description: Augm: S. Newton et Merton Do 184
rows.notes: Numbers '24 9 8' are clear and properly aligned under the three ruling lines. 'Do 184' (page ref) visible in middle column.
Amount '31 7 9' distinct and within valid ranges. Description legible.

rows.description: Augm Comm ejusdem Dno et Capell: Do 186
rows.notes: Pounds and shillings ('56 10') are clear. Pence column appears blank (no digits), so interpreted as 0d based on column alignment; description handwriting for 'Capell' is slightly ambiguous.
'28 13 8' is clearly written and aligned. 'Dno Rectori' label is distinct and repeated elsewhere on the page.
Amount '26 7 8' clear and within valid ranges. Description and page reference legible.

rows.description: Augm Kidl: pro 3 Anni particlr Do 188
rows.notes: Pounds/shillings/pence read as '49 5 10' with a small '1/4' after the pence (interpreted as farthing = 0.25). The quarter symbol is faint but visible; description has minor abbreviation ambiguity.
Repeat 'Dno Rectori' with amount '28 13 8' clearly written and aligned.

rows.description: Stip: ad Test D: Jo: Bapt: et off: Do 208
rows.notes: Amount '18 7 1' is clear; the abbreviation for 'Jo: Bapt:' is legible and context consistent with other entries.
Numbers '31 2 3' distinct and well-aligned. 'Id.' shorthand visible and consistent with previous 'Dno Shiers' entry.

rows.description: Augm: Comm: ejusdem Do (Morda Subd.) Do 210
rows.notes: Pounds and shillings '52 10' are clear; pence column shows no digit so taken as 0d. The small parenthetical text in the middle column is partially faded and its exact reading (Morda/Subd.) is somewhat uncertain.

rows.description: Id. Kidlington pro 4 parte Ann Do 211
rows.notes: Amount '16 5 8' is clear and within valid ranges. 'Kidlington' and 'pro 4 parte Ann' are legible.
Clear repeat of 'Dno Rectori' with amount '28 8 8' well-aligned and easy to read.

rows.description: Stip: Gwinear ad Test: Mid Do 212
rows.notes: Amount '24 14 8' clearly visible. 'Gwinear' and 'ad Test: Mid' are legible enough to transcribe with confidence.

rows.description: Augm Comm: de Wittacham Long Do 213
rows.notes: Values '34 16 9' are clear. Some letters in the middle description ('Wittacham Long') are cramped/abbreviated but overall readable.
Entry 'Dno Rectori' with amount '28 8 8' appears again as an ordinary line item; digits are distinct and properly aligned.
Amount '9 6 8' is clear. The left description is somewhat abbreviated ('Mr dow. Fine') and slightly cramped, but 'Kidlington Mills' is legible.
Pounds/shillings/pence read as '17 3 1' with a small '1/4' (farthing) marker after the pence; fraction is visible though slightly faint. 'Beaton' and 'Do' readable.
Final total '508 16 8' at page bottom right beneath a rule; digits are large and very clear indicating a page total.
